sqlCommand.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Crcy,GL,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Flex1) (select KeyID,Co,Crcy,'6011000' as GL,CC, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2), round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2), round(sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2),'pass1' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Co,Crcy,CC)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Crcy,GL,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID + '-data2',Co,Crcy,GL,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
Update TransX set GL = '2510001' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Crcy,GL,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID,Co,Crcy,'6011000' as GL,CC,round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1,round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2,round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2510001')
Update x set PC = c.PCtr, CC = '' From TransX x inner join CCtrs c on x.CC = c.CCtr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and x.GL = '2510001'
Update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
Update TransX set Txt = 'Bonus Accrual Prior Year Reversal', ProdCode = 'PYREV', UWYR = '[PY]', Flex1 = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set PK = (case when Amt3 > 0 then '40' else '50' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
